registered: 2026-07-10 — host-INDEPENDENT pre-registration, committed BEFORE any bare-metal sweep. Stage 2 (the S/L-dependent NUMBERS) is filled in on the host AFTER the fio ladder + link measurement but BEFORE the placement sweep (the two-stage discipline the handoff mandates).
quantity: 4-bit NF4 fused experts; per-layer packed stack ~= 302 MB (14.5 GB / 48 MoE layers), the unit a placement map moves between tiers
knee_formula: f_knee = 1 - S/L,  S = measured striped NVMe sequential read (GB/s), L = measured pinned H2D link bandwidth (GB/s). f = fraction of expert blocks on the RAM/fast tier.

stage2_to_measure_on_host.pred_flat_region_s_per_step: compute from L and bytes/step once L measured

access_informed_slices.source: Phase 0 access-pattern measurement (bench/access-pattern), Qwen3-30B real routing
access_informed_slices.rationale: the crossover surface is (placement f x access eff_tokens); Phase 0 showed real read_fraction crosses 0.5 at ~58 tok and plateaus 0.80 — so the interesting access slices are the below-knee / at-knee / plateau points, NOT the saturated >=1024-of-uniform grid

shape_prior_from_containerized_reprobe.source: bench/ssdtier + private e4b-ssdtier knee re-probe (AFTER the async-H2D fix)
shape_prior_from_containerized_reprobe.observed: placement s/step is MONOTONE and smooth in f after the async fix (f=1.0 3.83 -> f=0.0 5.32 s/step, +0/6.3/14.4/25.1/38.9%); f=1.0 == pure RAMStore to 0.5% (perf degenerate-end gate PASS)
shape_prior_from_containerized_reprobe.prediction: on a bandwidth-limited host (containerized S/L small) the knee sits near f=1.0 (little flat region); on a fast dedicated NVMe stripe (S/L larger) f_knee = 1 - S/L moves left, EXPOSING a flat region for f > f_knee. Whether that flat region materializes is THE bare-metal question this session answers.

gates_precommitted.G1_bit_exact: byte-identical control arm; torch.equal-exact degenerate ends; loss parity below the harness GPU noise floor (the measured-control method, not an epsilon)
gates_precommitted.G2_perf_degenerate: at f=1.0, step-time overhead vs the resident baseline <= 0.5% (was 15.4% pre-async-fix). FAIL => measuring serialization, STOP before recording.
gates_precommitted.G3_stripe_saturates_lane: measured striped sequential read S >= PCIe link bandwidth L BEFORE the sweep. If the stripe doesn't saturate the lane, the f-axis measures the wrong bottleneck and the crossover location is meaningless.

falsifiable_claim_4_5: there exists a placement fraction f* below which throughput holds ~link-floor (flat) and above which it degrades toward the SSD-bound floor, and f* tracks 1 - S/L; the crossover diagonal in (f, eff_tokens) is the located boundary of the SSD-tier regime.
non_goals: no absolute-bandwidth claim from any containerized pod (quarantine rule); 397B/shared-expert models out of scope until e4b extends; full 2D grid avoided — only the Phase-0 access slices are measured.
